title: Definitions
text: In this Agreement, 'Services' means the software development and maintenance services described in any Statement of Work executed hereunder. 'Fees' means the amounts payable as specified in the applicable SOW.

title: Payment Terms
text: All invoices shall be settled within 30 (thirty) days from the date of receipt of invoice. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month under Section 74 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.

title: Limitation of Liability
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this Agreement, in no event shall either party's aggregate liability exceed the total Fees paid by Client in the 12 months preceding the claim.

title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of India. Any dispute arising hereunder shall be resolved by arbitration in Bengaluru, Karnataka, under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.

title: Scope of Work
text: Vendor shall design, develop, and deliver a cloud-based data analytics platform as specified in the Technical Specifications attached hereto. Deliverables and timelines are set out in Schedule A.

title: Payment Schedule
text: Invoices shall be raised at the end of each calendar month. Client shall remit payment within 90 (ninety) days of invoice date. Milestone-based payments are detailed in Schedule A.

title: SLA and Service Credits
text: Vendor guarantees 99.5% uptime for the platform. In the event of SLA breaches, service credit penalties shall apply as specified in Exhibit B. Credits shall be applied to the following month's invoice.

title: Termination for Convenience
text: Either party may terminate this SOW with 15 (fifteen) days written notice. Subject to Section 5 of the MSA, liability upon termination shall be limited to work completed and expenses reasonably incurred.
